'''鈭歵h-z-th''' ('''thazathasha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nativise|nativise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-z-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nativise|nativise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-z-th
|-
! Lemma
| thazathasha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thazathithi|thazathithi]] || [[word:thazathiji|thazathiji]] || [[word:thazathishi|thazathishi]] || [[word:thazathi|thazathi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thazathuthuth|thazathuthuth]] || [[word:thazathujuj|thazathujuj]] || [[word:thazathushush|thazathushush]] || [[word:thazath|thazath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazathuthu|thazathuthu]] || [[word:thazathuju|thazathuju]] || [[word:thazathushu|thazathushu]] || [[word:thazathu|thazathu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazathufuth|thazathufuth]] || [[word:thazathufuj|thazathufuj]] || [[word:thazathufush|thazathufush]] || [[word:thazathuf|thazathuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thazathethe|thazathethe]] || [[word:thazatheje|thazatheje]] || [[word:thazatheshe|thazatheshe]] || [[word:thazathe|thazathe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thazathothoth|thazathothoth]] || [[word:thazathojoj|thazathojoj]] || [[word:thazathoshosh|thazathoshosh]] || [[word:thazath|thazath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazathotho|thazathotho]] || [[word:thazathojo|thazathojo]] || [[word:thazathosho|thazathosho]] || [[word:thazatho|thazatho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazathofoth|thazathofoth]] || [[word:thazathofoj|thazathofoj]] || [[word:thazathofosh|thazathofosh]] || [[word:thazathof|thazathof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thazath忙th忙|thazath忙th忙]] || [[word:thazath忙j忙|thazath忙j忙]] || [[word:thazath忙sh忙|thazath忙sh忙]] || [[word:thazath忙|thazath忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thazathathath|thazathathath]] || [[word:thazathajaj|thazathajaj]] || [[word:thazathashash|thazathashash]] || [[word:thazath|thazath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazathatha|thazathatha]] || [[word:thazathaja|thazathaja]] || [[word:thazathasha|thazathasha]] || [[word:thazatha|thazatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazathafath|thazathafath]] || [[word:thazathafaj|thazathafaj]] || [[word:thazathafash|thazathafash]] || [[word:thazathaf|thazathaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:thazathasha|thazathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gothazathasha|gothazathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokithazathasha|gokithazathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:thazathn眉sha|thazathn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gothazathnkn眉sha|gothazathnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokithazathn眉sha|gokithazathn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thazathsh毛sha|thazathsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothazathnksh毛sha|gothazathnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithazathsh毛sha|gokithazathsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thazathrosha|thazathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothazathnkrosha|gothazathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithazathrosha|gokithazathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thazathmusha|thazathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gothazathnkmusha|gothazathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithazathmusha|gokithazathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:thazathsherasha|thazathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gothazathnksherasha|gothazathnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokithazathsherasha|gokithazathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:thazathngasha|thazathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gothazathnkngasha|gothazathnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokithazathngasha|gokithazathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thazathyasha|thazathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gothazathnkyasha|gothazathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokithazathyasha|gokithazathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:thazathyamasha|thazathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gothazathnkyamasha|gothazathnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokithazathyamasha|gokithazathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:thazathn眉sh毛sha|thazathn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothazathnkn眉sh毛sha|gothazathnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithazathn眉sh毛sha|gokithazathn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thazathn眉rosha|thazathn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothazathnkn眉rosha|gothazathnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithazathn眉rosha|gokithazathn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thazathn眉musha|thazathn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothazathnkn眉musha|gothazathnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithazathn眉musha|gokithazathn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:thazathsh毛n眉sha|thazathsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothazathnksh毛n眉sha|gothazathnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithazathsh毛n眉sha|gokithazathsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thazathsh毛rosha|thazathsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothazathnksh毛rosha|gothazathnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithazathsh毛rosha|gokithazathsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thazathsh毛musha|thazathsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothazathnksh毛musha|gothazathnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithazathsh毛musha|gokithazathsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:thazathron眉sha|thazathron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothazathnkron眉sha|gothazathnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithazathron眉sha|gokithazathron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:thazathrosh毛sha|thazathrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothazathnkrosh毛sha|gothazathnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithazathrosh毛sha|gokithazathrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thazathromusha|thazathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothazathnkromusha|gothazathnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithazathromusha|gokithazathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:thazathmun眉sha|thazathmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothazathnkmun眉sha|gothazathnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithazathmun眉sha|gokithazathmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:thazathmush毛sha|thazathmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothazathnkmush毛sha|gothazathnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithazathmush毛sha|gokithazathmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thazathmurosha|thazathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothazathnkmurosha|gothazathnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithazathmurosha|gokithazathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:thazath|thazath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:th忙z忙th|th忙z忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hothazath|hothazath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoth忙z忙th|hoth忙z忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohothazath|hohothazath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoth忙z忙th|hohoth忙z忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉thazath|n眉thazath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉th忙z忙th|n眉th忙z忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉thazath|n眉n眉thazath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉th忙z忙th|n眉n眉th忙z忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂thazath|n茂thazath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂th忙z忙th|n茂th忙z忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂thazath|n茂n茂thazath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂th忙z忙th|n茂n茂th忙z忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luthazath|luthazath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luth忙z忙th|luth忙z忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluthazath|luluthazath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluth忙z忙th|luluth忙z忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lithazath|lithazath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lith忙z忙th|lith忙z忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilithazath|lilithazath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilith忙z忙th|lilith忙z忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kothazath|kothazath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koth忙z忙th|koth忙z忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokothazath|kokothazath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoth忙z忙th|kokoth忙z忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kethazath|kethazath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keth忙z忙th|keth忙z忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekethazath|kekethazath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketh忙z忙th|keketh忙z忙th]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
